allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\jonla\\football-analytics-hub\\public\\data\\players.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $json | Group-Object position_group | Select-Object Name, Count | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Host "`nSample by group:"; foreach \($g in @\('Goalkeeper','Defender','Midfielder','Forward'\)\) { $sample = $json | Where-Object { $_.position_group -eq $g } | Sort-Object minutes -Descending | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Host \("  {0,-11} -> {1} \({2}\) at {3}, {4:N0} min" -f $g, $sample.player, $sample.position, $sample.team, $sample.minutes\) })
